title: Horses can Float
description: Lets Horses swim when you ride them
body:
Want to use Horses but don't want to baby them across every body of water?

**This Datapack enables all Horse-like mobs to swim while your ride them.**
**No more building pesky bridges or pushing your mount!**

Huge ty to [mega7](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mega7/) for coming up with the idea on how to actually do this in a not sketchy way. I simply made a stand-alone pack of their [Quality of Live Changes](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/quality-of-life-changes/) and added a bit more functionality and machanic-optimisation.



Affected Mobs:
- Horses
- Zombie Horses (will sink if they wander into water without you riding them)
- Skeleton Horses (will sink if they wander into water without you riding them)
- Mules
- Donkeys
- Camels
